title: Marcus Nettelton
compiled_truth: Marcus Nettelton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-13 to 2002-02-07), Marcus Nettelton sent 156 and received 864 emails, totalling 1020 interactions.
